data_sources: Solana on-chain explorer (Token Program, staking programs)
CYNIC test wallets (synthetic patterns for ground truth)
notes.epistemic_status: Observed (public data, on-chain verified, documented archives)
notes.quality_assurance: All human addresses have 1+ year tenure; all sybils have <7d age OR single_token_pct>90 OR documented exploit
notes.falsification: If ROC-AUC < 0.7, heuristic does not generalize; revise weights and re-test on expanded corpus (20H+20S)
